name: 82labs
description: Skills from 82Labs for building agent-native businesses on top of Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, and Sheets.

plugins.name: like-you
plugins.description: One-shot bootstrap of a ~/Business/.claude/ workspace from 90 days of Gmail/Calendar/Drive/Docs/Sheets. Produces CLAUDE.md, a /context/ entity graph, a voice.md style profile distilled from your sent mail, 5-10 business-specific generated skills split into content and judgment, and an automations.md spec for proactive triggers. Hebrew-first, English fallback. Local files accepted when MCPs are missing.
